chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 159 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 06.11.2023 Mr. Abdul Majeed Mirbahar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Sanwal Khan Chachar, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.6 & 7, which is taken on record. Learned Counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
